title: Elbow Grease Drain Unblocker - Dissolves Hair & Grease Clogs | Suitable for Sinks, Baths & Showers (2 Pack Sachets)
features: POWERFUL DRAIN UNBLOCKER: Elbow Grease Drain Unblocker is effective at unblocking slow running sinks and basins. It dissolves hair & grease, removing unwated deposits causing blockages. This fast-acting formula ensures water flows freely again in minutes.

PROFESSIONAL RESULTS IN MINUTES: No need to wait hours for action—this powerful cleaner starts working as soon as it’s applied. Enjoy cleaner hassle-free drains without the long delays of traditional methods.

IDEAL FOR SINKS, BATHS AND SHOWERS: The perfect solution for kitchen sinks, bathroom basins, and shower plugholes. Eliminate blockages and their unpleasant odours quickly to keep water flowing smoothly.

DISSOLVES HAIR & GREASE FOR A DEEP CLEAN: No need to call a plumber—this drain unblocker breaks down common blockages at the source. It penetrates through standing water, built-up grime & clogs, restoring your pipes performance.

EASY-TO-USE SACHETS FOR NO-MESS SOLUTION: Each Elbow Grease sachet contains the perfect amount for a single treatment. Simply pour, wait, and rinse—no need to measure or guess, just effortless cleaning with professional results.

PREVENT FUTURE BLOCKAGES WITH REGULAR USE: Keep drains clear and free-flowing by using this sink unblocker monthly. A simple preventative step that saves you time. Keep drains clear all around the home
TOUGH ON CLOGS, GENTLE ON PIPES: Formulated to dissolve blockages without damaging pipes, making it a safe and effective choice for regular use in your home. The only cleaner you'll ever need.

CHOOSE 2 OR 3 PACK FOR ONGOING MAINTENANCE: Available in a 2-pack for quick fixes or a 3-pack for regular use. Keep your homes drains clear and prevent future build-ups with these ready to use handy sachets.
ELIMINATES UNPLEASANT ODOURS: Removes trapped debris, freeing the standing water that cause foul smells, leaving your home smelling clean and fresh.

ESSENTIAL FOR EVERY HOUSEHOLD CLEANING KIT: Keep a pack on hand to tackle unexpected blockages before they become a major problem. A must-have addition to your collection of cleaning products for easy cleaning
description: Product Description Say goodbye to slow-draining sinks and stubborn clogs with Elbow Grease Drain Unblocker. This powerful formula is designed to dissolve hair, grease, and soap build-up, restoring free-flowing water in minutes. Whether tackling a blocked bathroom sink, a clogged shower, or a slow-draining bath, this easy-to-use solution penetrates deep into pipes, breaking down debris for a thorough clean. With no need for complicated tools or expensive plumber visits, it’s the quick and reliable way to maintain a clean and hygienic home. Safe for use in indoor drainage systems, it also helps prevent bad odours and future blockages when used regularly. Available in convenient 2-pack or 3-pack sachets, ensuring you always have a solution ready when you need it. Ingredients Contains Soduim Hydroxide Aluminium Powder ( Stabilised) Directions * Read all instructions and warnings before use * Ensure the sink is dry before use. Remove standing water with a sponge and allow as much water to drain away as possible. * Wear suitable protective gloves before opening the sachet and during use * Ensure drain area is well ventiliated before and during use * Pour contents of the sachet directly down the plug hole at arm's length * Pour a cup full of warm water (not boiling) down the plug hole * Allow to stand for 15 minutes to allow the foam to penetrate the blockage * Rinse thoroughly with cold water * If drain is still blocked repeat application * To help prevent blockages from returning, use monthly. IMPORTANT: Use only for indoor drain cleaning. Do not use in toilets. Do not pour product in standing water. Do not mix with other chemicals. Safety Warning Causes severe skin burns and damage. In contact with water releases flammable gases. Keep out of reach of children. Read label before use. Wear protective gloves, protective clothing & eye protection. IF SWALLOWED: rinse mouth. Do NOT induce vomiting. IF ON SKIN (or hair): Take off immediately all contaminated clothing. Rinse skin with water / shower. IF IN EYES: Rinse cautiously with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses, if present and easy to do. Continue rinsing. If medical advice is needed, have product container or label at hand. See more
